items.headline: Astros start 3-game series with the Dodgers
items.description:

Houston; Monday, 8:10 p.m. EDT

items.headline: Reds play the Cubs looking to end road skid
items.description:
Cincinnati Reds (20-14, second in the NL Central) vs. Chicago Cubs (22-12, first in the NL Central)

items.description:

items.description:

items.description:
Toronto Blue Jays (16-18, third in the AL East) vs. Tampa Bay Rays (21-12, second in the AL East)

items.headline: In his first Game 7, Jarrett Allen delivers a 22-point, 19-rebound night to help Cavs advance
items.description:
CLEVELAND (AP) — Jarrett Allen is usually laid back before games, including interacting with the crowd during the last minute of pregame warmups.
That wasn't the case Sunday night as he played in his first Game 7.
